steps.title: Use years after the start
steps.content: Let $t$ be the number of years after $1998$. Then the known points are $(0{,}47)$ and $(20{,}231)$, and $2022$ corresponds to $t=24$.

steps.title: Find the linear model
steps.content:
Find the slope from the known points:
$$
m=\frac{231-47}{20-0}=\frac{184}{20}=9.2
$$
Since the value at $t=0$ is $47$, the model is $y=9.2t+47$.

steps.title: Predict the later value
steps.content: Substitute $t=24$: $$ y=9.2(24)+47=267.8 $$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $268$. The answer is 268.
